title: Scott Taylor (darts player)
extract: Scott Taylor (born 22 August 1991) is an English darts player from Bolton who competes in Professional Darts Corporation (PDC) events. A PDC Tour Card holder from 2017 to 2018, he is a one-time PDC Pro Tour finalist, finishing as the runner-up at Players Championship 9 on the 2018 PDC Pro Tour.
